Question: Is there a specific time to add or drop a course?
Answer: The period for adding and dropping courses are stated in the academic calendar. The required procedures must be completed within the defined time to add or drop a course, and no adding or dropping courses outside the specified time period will be allowed.

Question: I want to add or drop a course, how and where do I do it?
Answer: Adding and dropping courses are completed through the OIS platform. First of all, the student needs to inform his/her advisor, who had approved his/her course selections before, by e-mail. This is because the student must get his/her advisor to remove his/her approval for the courses in order for the student to make changes to his/her selection of the courses over the OIS platform. Once the approval granted previously has been removed, the student then can perform the necessary actions and send the changes to the advisor's approval once again by clicking the "send to advisor" button. New course registration can only be completed following the approval of the advisor.

Question: How can I find out who my advisor is?

Since the appointment is made automatically, if an advisor has not been appointed for you, you need to inform the institute at once by sending an e-mail to the institute (enstitu@beykoz.edu.tr) to sort out the issue.

Question: Which letter grades I get will be sufficient for me to be considered successful in a course?
Answer: A student who has received one of the following letter grades AA, BA, BB, CB, CC, BI and M as a passing grade for a course is deemed to have been successful in that course.

Question: Which letter grades I get from a course will cause me to fail that course?
Answer: A student who receives one of the letter grades FF, BZ and DZ in a course is considered unsuccessful in that course.
